matches.lb: Quoting Commentary: Ibn Ezra on Exodus 18:27:1
matches.x: AND MOSES LET HIS FATHER-IN-LAW DEPART. With respect,263Va-yeshellach (let depart) can be translated: and he sent away. as in and Abraham went with them to bring them on the way (Gen. 18:16).264There too le-shallecham (to bring them on the way) is not to be rendered: to send them away, but rather to escort them. See I.E. on Gen. 18:16 and the notes thereto.
